subcodes.first_line: O servant of the divine threshold! The letter which thou hadst addressed to His Holiness Javád hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه یزدان نامه ای که بحضرت جواد مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید نامه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @interpretation of dreams and visions
